_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-imagegen. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM so it can invoke the skill. Parameters are identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI Chat Completions / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate. Max 2000 characters.

model.description: flux = fast general image (default); retro = pixel-art sprite/tile; nano = high-detail 2K.

out.description: Optional output file path. Defaults to out/<model>-<aspect>.<ext>.

function.name: mythosforge_generate_image
function.description: Generate a 2D image from a text prompt via MythosForge's Replicate-backed engine (flux-schnell / retro-diffusion / nano-banana-2). Writes the image to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

prompt.description: Text description of the image. Max 2000 chars.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_generate_image
anthropic.description: Generate a 2D image from a text prompt via MythosForge's Replicate-backed engine (flux-schnell / retro-diffusion / nano-banana-2). Writes the image to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

prompt.description: Text description of the image. Max 2000 chars.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, model, aspect, prompt, path, bytes }. Feed `path` back to the model as the tool result.
